reviews.comment:
Un poquito más de onda los playeros, pero al parecer son o actúan de esa forma la gente de esa zona.

(Translated by Google)
The beachgoers are a bit more laid-back, but apparently that's just how people in that area are or how they act.

reviews.comment:
Siempre nos atienden excelente y tienen un Cheff muy bueno con platos exquisitos.

(Translated by Google)
They always serve us excellently and have a very good chef with exquisite dishes.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Please note, if you're going to continue traveling along Route 40 toward La Quiaca, fill up your gas tank here...

reviews.comment:
Es la única estación de servicio en kilómetros... No tiene ni para sacar agua caliente. Un desastre YPF y el ACA. Tampoco había papel higiénico en el baño. Un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station for miles around... They don't even have hot water. YPF and the ACA are a disaster. There wasn't even any toilet paper in the bathroom. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MnFQeDlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mal que a estas alturas una YPF no tenga infinia diésel ni D500 solo diésel común 1500, tampoco recibían tarjetas

(Translated by Google)
It's terrible that at this point a YPF station doesn't have Infinia Diesel or D500, only regular 1500 diesel, and they didn't accept cards either.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OHRqbXRnRRAB
